description: A hand-drawn diagram of a mechanism/anatomy/process (DNA, eye cross-section, brain hemispheres, gene->melanin arrows) with handwritten labels. Labels are usually baked into the diagram image; extra labels can appear on the spoken word.
whenToUse: A how-something-works / anatomy / cause->effect beat (melanin, cones, lateralization, inheritance).
generalize: The diagram subject, its labels, and the field are SLOTS. Red marks the defect/mutation. Arrows show progression.
produces: gpt-image-2 diagram (with baked handwritten labels, surfaces locked) as bgUrl; any APPEARING label = gpt-image-2 lettering (label-handwritten) overlay.

diagram.note: SHORT description of the diagram + its exact baked labels in quotes; red marks defect; arrows show flow

styleLock: Diagram + baked labels = one gpt-image-2 image (lock all other surfaces). Appearing labels = gpt-image-2 lettering (label-handwritten voice).
rules: Handwritten diagram labels usually BAKED into the image.
Red marks the defect/mutation; arrows show A->B->C.
Extend a prior diagram to show 'one more' (reuse + add).
